heading: GitHub Accounts Require a Public Email Address
body:
If you try to register with Github, you must have an public email
address associated with your GitHub account. Atlas returns an error
if you attempt to register without a public email address.

To set a public GitHub email address:

- After you log into GitHub, click **Settings** on your
  profile menu. Your **Public Profile** page should display.

- Select one email address from the **Public email** dropdown
  in your **Public Profile**.

  If GitHub greys out this dropdown menu:

  - Click **Emails** from the left-side menu.

  - Clear the **Keep my email addresses private** box.

  - Return to the **Public Profile** page and select an email
    address from the **Public email** dropdown.

- Click **Update profile** to save the changes.
